steps.title: Identify the compound predicate structure
steps.content: The sentence has a single subject “the Sherpas” with two coordinated verbs: “pack up their telescopes” and “______ ready,” joined by “and.”

steps.title: Apply parallel tense rule
steps.content: Coordinated verbs sharing the same subject must be in the same tense. “Pack” is simple present tense, so the blank requires simple present; “get” matches this tense. The other options use different tenses—past perfect, simple past, and past progressive—violating the parallel structure requirement. That matches choice A — A is correct.
